ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., airport, city center, rural area) */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., wind speed, air temperature) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time the measurement was collected */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the measurement (e.g., good, bad, uncertain) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "u_wind_speed" REAL /* U-component of the wind speed */,
  "v_wind_speed" REAL /* V-component of the wind speed */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_temperature_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature value */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_radiation_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation value */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation value */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast_data" TEXT /* Forecast data (e.g., JSON object) */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used to generate the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, meteorologist, researcher) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "login_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user logged in */,
  "login_device" TEXT /* Device used for login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "export_time" TEXT /* Time the export was generated */,
  "export_data" TEXT /* Export data (e.g., CSV file contents) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "import_time" TEXT /* Time the import was generated */,
  "import_data" TEXT /* Import data (e.g., CSV file contents) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data (e.g., JSON object) */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., error, warning) */,
  "event_message" TEXT /* Message describing the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
